# Digital Marketing Dashboard - Project Setup Instructions

This is a comprehensive Next.js full-stack digital marketing dashboard with the following features:

## Project Features
- **Analytics & Reporting**: Charts, graphs, and custom reports
- **Real-time Updates**: Live data synchronization
- **Authentication**: Secure user login and management
- **Data Export**: Export analytics and reports to multiple formats
- **Responsive Design**: Mobile-friendly interface
- **Content Management**: Content creation and scheduling
- **CRM Integration**: Customer relationship management
- **Customer Feedback**: Feedback collection and management
- **Notifications**: Marketing reminders and alerts
- **Decision Support**: AI-driven insights and recommendations

## Technology Stack
- **Frontend**: Next.js 14+ with TypeScript and React
- **Backend**: Next.js API Routes
- **Database**: PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM
- **Authentication**: NextAuth.js
- **Charts**: Recharts for data visualization
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **UI Components**: Custom components + Shadcn/ui
